title: Takara Ex Taq PCR
description: Takara Bio TaKaRa Ex Taq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL high-yield standard reaction (worked example shown for a 1 kb target).

payload.notes: Vendor: Takara Bio, TaKaRa Ex Taq DNA Polymerase (Cat. RR001A). The datasheet gives a single worked example (1 kb fragment): 98 C/10 sec denaturation, 55 C/30 sec annealing, 72 C/1 min extension, 30 cycles, with no separate initial-denaturation or final-extension step. For denaturation, Takara recommends 98 C for 5-10 sec or 94 C for 20-30 sec depending on the cycler/tubes. Primers 0.2-1.0 uM. 1X buffer = 2 mM Mg2+. The 55 C annealing is from the example, optimize to your primer Tm. Source: https://www.takarabio.com/documents/User%20Manual/RR001A/RR001A_DS.v1902Da.pdf
